gemma-4-E4B-it.question: Transcribe this speech word by word.
gemma-4-E4B-it.answer: This week I traveled to Chicago to deliver my final farewell address to the nation. It was an opportunity to say thank you, whether we've seen eye-to-eye or rarely agreed at all. My conversations with you, the American people in living rooms and schools, at farms and on factory floors, at diners and on distant military outposts. All these conversations are what have kept me honest
